header.label: Multi-Class Unit Analytics
header.headline: 27% of schools report MCU — 4.04 L schools
header.sub: 4.04 L of 14.71 L schools report Multi-Class Units. Incidence is 31% in rural schools and 10% in urban schools. State Government schools account for 98.5% of all MCU schools

cards.label: MCU School Coverage
cards.note: 27% of schools report MCU. Students enrolled in schools reporting MCU total 2.78 Cr

cards.label: Rural Incidence
cards.note: MCU incidence is 20.9 points higher in rural schools than in urban schools (31.2% vs 10.3%)

cards.label: State Government Concentration
cards.note: State Government schools account for 98.5% of all MCU schools; MCU incidence within State Government schools is 39.4%

cards.label: School Category Profile
cards.headlineNote: MCU schools in Foundational + Preparatory category
cards.barLabel: 3.01 L MCU schools in Foundational + Preparatory
cards.note: Foundational + Preparatory schools comprise 74.6% of all MCU schools and show the highest MCU incidence at 41.3%
